intro:
How well do you know the wisdom of the world?
Test yourself with surprising proverbs from around the globe!
description:
Discover surprising proverbs and sayings from around the world in this fun true-or-false quiz game.
Some are clever, some are strange, and some may make you say, “Wait, that’s a real proverb?”

Answer simple true-or-false questions as you explore different cultures, ways of thinking, and bits of everyday wisdom from across the globe.
Perfect for trivia fans, casual play sessions, and anyone who loves learning something new while having fun.

Easy to play and great for short breaks, this quiz game lets you enjoy the fun of guessing, learning, and being surprised.
